name: critic
description: Evaluates articles for hallucination, citation accuracy, claim grounding, internal consistency, and audience alignment

skills.name: Article Evaluation
skills.description: Evaluates article quality with 5 quantified metrics: citation accuracy, claim grounding, internal consistency, audience alignment, completeness
examples: Evaluate this article draft against the research findings for hallucinations

skills.name: Hallucination Detection
skills.description: Identifies ungrounded claims, citation errors, and factual inconsistencies
examples: Check if all claims in the article are supported by the provided research
